hero.title1: The IT solution your company needs
hero.subtitle1: Infrastructure, cybersecurity, development and specialized talent to support your technological growth.
hero.subtitle2: Automated security audits for AWS, Azure and GCP. Identify vulnerabilities before attackers do.
hero.subtitle3: Discover how companies like INTA, LETIS and KONECTA transformed their infrastructure with SerTIC.

services.descripcion: Comprehensive technology solutions for your company

infraestructura.title: IT Infrastructure
infraestructura.fullDescription: We transform your technological infrastructure into a competitive advantage. Our specialized team designs, implements and manages robust solutions that ensure 24/7 operational continuity.

detailedFeatures.title: Physical and Virtual Servers
detailedFeatures.description: Design and implementation of on-premise infrastructure with Windows Server and Linux, virtualization with VMware and Hyper-V.

detailedFeatures.title: Cloud Infrastructure
detailedFeatures.description: Migration and management of infrastructure on AWS, Azure and Google Cloud Platform with scalable and secure architectures.

detailedFeatures.title: Backup and Disaster Recovery
detailedFeatures.description: Implementation of automated backup solutions with Veeam, replication and disaster recovery plans.

detailedFeatures.title: Monitoring 24/7
detailedFeatures.description: Proactive monitoring with Zabbix, Prometheus and Grafana to detect and resolve issues before they impact your operations.

ciberseguridad.title: Cybersecurity & Hardening
ciberseguridad.description: We reduce risks and strengthen your assets.
ciberseguridad.fullDescription: In a digital world where threats evolve constantly, we protect your company with robust cybersecurity solutions based on international standards and industry best practices.

detailedFeatures.title: Security Audits
detailedFeatures.description: Comprehensive vulnerability assessment using Prowler, Wazuh, Vulseek and specialized tools to identify security gaps.

detailedFeatures.title: System Hardening
detailedFeatures.description: Hardening of servers, applications and networks following CIS frameworks and ISO 27002 standards.

detailedFeatures.title: Incident Management
detailedFeatures.description: Rapid incident response with containment, eradication and recovery plans.

detailedFeatures.title: Compliance and Regulations
detailedFeatures.description: Implementation of controls for ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR and local regulations compliance.

development.title: Development & DevOps
development.fullDescription: We accelerate your development lifecycle with modern DevOps practices, infrastructure automation and robust CI/CD pipelines that reduce time-to-market and improve software quality.

detailedFeatures.title: Infrastructure as Code
detailedFeatures.description: Full infrastructure automation with Terraform and Ansible for reproducible, versioned environments.

detailedFeatures.title: Kubernetes & Containers
detailedFeatures.description: Container orchestration with Kubernetes, EKS, AKS and management with Rancher or OpenShift.

detailedFeatures.title: CI/CD Pipelines
detailedFeatures.description: Implementation of automated pipelines with GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps.

detailedFeatures.title: Monitoring & Observability
detailedFeatures.description: Complete observability stack with Prometheus, Grafana, ELK and APM tools.

staffing.title: Staffing IT
staffing.description: Technical talent to scale with flexibility.
staffing.fullDescription: We empower your team with highly skilled IT professionals. Our flexible model allows you to scale resources according to your project needs.
benefits: Managed external resources with expert oversight

detailedFeatures.title: Talent Selection
detailedFeatures.description: Technical assessments and interviews to ensure the best fit for your team and project.

detailedFeatures.title: Agile Onboarding
detailedFeatures.description: Fast integration of resources with training and ongoing support.

detailedFeatures.title: Continuous Support
detailedFeatures.description: We support your operations with monitoring, reporting and continuous alignment.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Welcome to SerTIC Tech Solutions. By accessing or using our services, you agree to the following terms.

about.whyDescription: We provide reliable IT solutions for companies, with continuous monitored support, secure infrastructure and strategic consulting to protect and grow your business.
about.feature1Description: We have IT experts to ensure efficient, reliable solutions.
about.feature2Description: We apply controls and processes aligned to ISO/IEC 27002 and NIST CSF 2.0 to manage risks, secure access and respond to incidents.
about.feature3Description: 24/7 on-call for incidents and critical alerts, with triage, escalation and recovery.

footer.descripcion: Reliable IT solutions for businesses. We turn technology into the engine of your growth.

serviceDetail.benefitsText: Discover the advantages of choosing our services
serviceDetail.stackText: Modern and reliable technologies for your project

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.subtitle: At SerTIC Tech Solutions we explain how we use cookies to improve your experience and protect your privacy.

whatAreCookies.title: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to remember your preferences, collect statistics, and show relevant content.

cookieTypes.title: Types of cookies we use
cookieTypes.analyticsText: help us understand how you use our site (e.g., Google Analytics).
cookieTypes.advertisingText: allow us to display personalized ads.

consentManagement.title: Consent management
consentManagement.text: When you first visit our site, we ask for your consent to use cookies. You can accept or reject them at any time. If you want to change your decision, you can use the "Configure cookies" button.

disableCookies.title: How to disable cookies
disableCookies.text: You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Keep in mind that some site features may not be available if you disable certain cookies.

settings.title: Cookie Settings
settings.analyticsText: Google Analytics and similar tools to understand how you use our site
settings.adsText: Personalized ads based on your interests and behavior

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: At SerTIC Tech Solutions we value your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

section1.title: 1. Information we collect
section1.text: We may collect contact data, service usage, web forms, etc.

section2.title: 2. Use of information
section2.text: We use data to provide our services, improve processes, and communicate with you.

section3.title: 3. Your rights
section3.textPrefix: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data by writing to
